codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested categories admin UI flows (grid, add/edit/duplicate, delete with reassignment) and wiring. I found two non-blocking robustness issues in edit/delete edge paths.

issues.description: `existingImage` is only set when `cat.catImage` is truthy; it is never explicitly cleared when loading a category without an image. If the component instance is reused across category IDs, stale image preview/delete UI can persist from a previous category.

When `/article-count` fails (non-OK), the code silently leaves `articleCount` at 0 and hides reassignment UI. For categories that actually have articles, delete then fails server-side requiring `newCatId`, but the UI provides no replacement selector in that state.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `fullstack-worker` skill's strict 'Write API tests first (red)' step is not always aligned with incremental UI-focused features that only add a small supporting endpoint to an already-implemented API. Worker handoff explicitly flagged this mismatch.

summary: Reviewed feature categories-admin-ui (commit acff014), transcript skeleton, and full diff. Feature meets requested behavior with no blocking defects; reported two non-blocking edge-case issues and one skill-procedure observation.
